purpose: Pin the FamilyScoringMetrics input contract for future ML-layer trainers (C10).

sha_method.note: ast.unparse normalises whitespace and strips comments. Cosmetic docstring edits inside the pinned blocks therefore CHANGE the SHA but DO NOT change the consumer contract — see drift_policy.cosmetic_docstring.

drift_policy.cosmetic_docstring: Update pinned_source_sha256 only; no schema_version bump. Add a one-line CHANGELOG note.
drift_policy.field_added: MINOR — add to family_metrics_fields, update SHA; no schema_version bump (additive contract).
drift_policy.field_removed_or_renamed: MAJOR — bump schema_version to v2 and add ADR.
drift_policy.default_value_changed: MAJOR — bump schema_version to v2 (training-data implication).

consumer_contract.drift_changes_break: Any change to the pinned source blocks bumps schema_version to v2 and requires a CHANGELOG + ADR entry.
